title: Assembly Elections LIVE: Clash breaks out between TMC and BJP supporters in Baranagar ahead of West Bengal Assembly polls
content:
A clash erupted between supporters of the Trinamool Congress (TMC) and the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP).
*   The incident occurred in Baranagar, West Bengal.
*   It took place ahead of the state's upcoming Assembly elections.

title: A true benevolent authoritarian enforces discipline for the greater good: Seeman
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   Seeman advocates for the concept of a "true benevolent authoritarian."
*   Such a leader is defined by their enforcement of discipline.
*   This discipline is justified by its ultimate aim to achieve the "greater good" for society.

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Segments under Vadakara LS seat could see some keen contests
content:
The news pertains to the upcoming Kerala Assembly Elections, scheduled for 2026.
*   The specific focus is on the assembly segments that fall under the Vadakara Lok Sabha (LS) constituency.
*   These segments are predicted to witness highly competitive or "keen" electoral contests.

title: T.N. Assembly election: For second time, Pottalurani residents to boycott polls over fish waste processing units
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Residents of Pottalurani plan to boycott the upcoming T.N. Assembly election.
*   Their decision is a protest against the presence and issues caused by fish waste processing units in their area.
*   This marks the second consecutive time the residents have boycotted polls over this unresolved grievance.

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: CPI(M) State Committee stands firmon six seats
content:
The CPI(M) State Committee has taken a firm stance.
*   They are insisting on contesting six seats in the upcoming election.
*   This decision specifically concerns the Tamil Nadu Assembly election.

title: T.N. Assembly election: parties must avoid excessive freebies, focus on development, says ex-Minister Semmalai
content:
Ex-Minister Semmalai has advised political parties regarding the upcoming T.N. Assembly election.
*   He urged parties to avoid offering excessive freebies to voters.
*   Instead, he stressed that their focus should be on genuine development.

title: Bandi Sanjay inaugurates Jan Aushadi Kendra in Karimnagar
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Bandi Sanjay inaugurated a Jan Aushadi Kendra.
*   The event took place in Karimnagar.
*   Jan Aushadi Kendras provide affordable generic medicines to the public.

title: No blanket exemption for women teachers above 50 from SIR and census: Revenue Department
content:
The Revenue Department has denied a blanket exemption for women teachers above 50 years old.
*   These teachers will still be required to perform Service in Rural (SIR) and census duties.
*   The decision clarifies that there will be no automatic waiver from these responsibilities based solely on age and gender.

title: Union Minister Kiren Rijiju interacts with Bishops and pastors
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   Union Minister Kiren Rijiju
*   Held an interaction
*   With Bishops and pastors

title: RDG discontinuation fallout: Himachal presents ‘reduced’ budget
content:
The discontinuation of 'RDG' has led to significant financial fallout.
*   This fallout has directly impacted the state of Himachal Pradesh.
*   Consequently, Himachal has presented a "reduced" budget.
